violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw Ground beef, raw turkey, raw chicken & raw whole muscle beef stored on same shelf in walk-in cooler.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Multiple food items in walk-in cooler not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Walk-in cooler wire rack shelving has an accumulation of debris and needs cleaning.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware-washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. See attached table.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Invert forks at service station. Store handles upright.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Hand sink near walk-in cooler not provided with hand soap.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Exposed studs & insulation on wall at back prep area. Replace missing/moved ceiling tiles.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate. Operator unable to locate certificate.
